title: Herobrine011840's Cave Biomes
description: This mod adds new biomes and resources to overworld caves.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tpj8gGsJC0I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/213/herobrine011840s-cave-biomes.png)


Curseforge page is [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/herobrine011840s-cave-biomes)

**_THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB_**

Herobrine011840's Cave Biomes adds new cave biomes to the overworld. These are semi-rare and occur in all regions of the Overworld.



New Additions:

# Blocks

Grimslate:

-This stone type is found in the Grimslate Caves biome. It can be crafted into chiseled and brick variants.

Climbing Moss:

-A common plant found in the Grimslate Caves that can be used for food.

Gloom Tubes:

-These plant blocks are found in Grimslate Caves. They are a purely decorative block.

Forbodum Vines:

-These are a common vine block found on the ceiling of the Grimslate Caves. They behave similarly to Weeping Vines.

Abyssum:

-This block is a small tree-like plant found in the Grimslate Caves. They can be used as a source of planks.

Old Speleothic Stone:

-This is a stone block found in the Archaic Caves. It does not have many uses.

Ancient Leaves:

-This block can be found occasionally in Archaic Caves. It is a decor block.

Grotto Daisy:

-A common flower found in the Archaic Caves that can be crafted into Light Gray Dye.

Redstonial Bloom:

-This uncommon flower that is found in Archaic Caves emits a redstone power of 13 and can be crafted into Redstone Dust.

Archaica Marigold:

-A rare flower found in Archaic Caves that can be crafted into Solar Dust, which is used for a Framed Lamp.

Framed Lamp:

-This decorative block is crafted from Solar Dust, Iron, and Glass. Any undead mob that walks on it will be set on fire.

Concave Syenite:

-This stone makes up the majority of the Hollow Fracture biome. It has many decorative variants, as well as a Hollow variant.

Hollow Flesh:

-These blocks are found growing on the floor of the Hollow Fracture biome. The Hollow Flesh blocks make the player unable to jump over them.

Anchor Chains:

 -A functional block crafted with Chains and Shrapnel. Placing this block or powering it with Redstone will create a long line of chains extending downward from the block.

Ancient Lootbox:

-This block can be found within Broken Fortresses in the Hollow Fracture. Clicking on them with a Hollonite Pearl will make it drop some loot. They have a chance of breaking when you do this.

Dacite:

-This block can be found in the Dacite Caves, in Dacite Ruins, or crafted with Andesite and Nether Quartz. It has a very large amount of decorative variants.

Dacite Sand:

-This block is found in Dacite Caves and Dacite Ruins. It can be smelted into Dacite Glass.

Dacite Glass:

-This is a frameless version of Glass made by smelting Dacite Sand.

Clearwater:

-This block is a variant of Water found in the Dacite Caves.

Limestone:

-This stone is found in Limestone Caves. it has a lot of decorative variants, and it can be used to craft Stone items.

Cave Frond:

-A tall flower found in the Limestone Caves. it can be made into Orange Dye.

Lumenshroom Soil:

-A variant of dirt found in the Lumenshroom Caves. It can be smelted into a smooth variant.

Lumenshrooms:

-These block are a light blue version of Mushrooms found in the Lumenshroom Caves.

Glimmershale:

-This decorative stone is found in the Glittering Caves. It has a few decorative brick variants.

Glittering Crystals:

-These crystals are found in the Glittering Caves. They are purely decorative.

Glittergrass:

-This plant is found in the Glittering Caves. It drops Glittering Dust when broken without shears.

Glittering Lamp:

-This light block can be crafted with Glittering Dust and Iron Nuggets. It has no functional use, other than looking good.

Gemslate:

-This is a rare stone found in Woodland Mansions and the Diamond Mines.

# Items

Moss Loaf:

-This item is a decent food source crafted from Wheat and Climbing Moss. it can be found in Mining Shacks and Broken Fortresses.

Hollonite Shield:

-This gear item is a stronger version of a Shield. It has 2048 durability and gives the holder 2 seconds of Strength I when an attack is blocked.

Spirit Essence:

-This rare item is dropped by the Lumenshroom Spirit. It is a vital crafting ingredient for the Ban Hammer.

Ban Hammer:

-This weapon is crafted from Spirit Essence, Shrapnel Scraps, and Sticks. It has extremely high attack damage, but is incredibly slow.

Glittering Dust:

-This item can be obtained from Glittergrass and can be used to make Glittering Crystal Blocks or Glittering Lamps.

Copper Tools:

-This tool set is in between stone and Iron. The tools have 187 durability.

Magentrosite:

-This rare resource can be used to upgrade either Netherite or Irisite Tools. It is crafted with A Netherite Scrap, A Malevolium Ingot, and an Irisite Gemstone on a Smithing Table.

Spelunker's Pickaxe:

-This super rare item can only be obtained once in your world, as it is a reward for completing every Herobrine011840's Cave Biomes advancement. it can be combined with existing Netherite or Magentrosite Pickaxes in order to transfer their enchantments. The pickaxe is purely cosmetic and does not provide any additional benefits.

Smithing Templates:

 -There is a new Armor Trim in this mod, and it is called the Caverns Armor Trim. It is found occasionally in Mining Shacks.

 -3 new upgrade templates are also a part of this mod:

  -The Malevolium Upgrade can be obtained in Mining shacks or by killing Evokers

  -The Irisite Upgrade can be found in Mining Shacks or in Dacite Fountains

 -The Magentrosite Upgrade can be found in Mining Shacks or from killing a Wither

 -One last Smithing Template found in this mod is the Hollonite Shield template found in Broken Fortresses. It is used to craft a Hollonite Shield.

Music Discs:

 -There are 3 new discs in this mod:

  -Descension is found in Mining Shacks

 -Deepest is found in Ancient Cities

 -Hollowing is found in Broken Fortresses

# Ores

Malevolium:

![Malevolium Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/254/2025-01-22_17.png)

This ore can be found in Grimslate Caves. it can be used to make Malevolium Gear, which is about as strong as Diamond. There is a decorative bar variant as well.

Hollonite:

![Hollonite Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/255/2025-01-22_17.png)

This is a semi-common ore found in the Hollow Fracture. It is used to craft Hollonite Shields and to obtain loot from Ancient Lootboxes.

Shrapnel:

![Shrapnel Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/256/2025-01-22_17.png)

This uncommon ore can be found in the Hollow Fracture. It is used to make the Ban Hammer.

Irisite:

![Irisite Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/257/2025-01-22_17.png)

This is an uncommon ore found in the Dacite Caves. It can be used to make Irisite gear, which is between Diamond and Netherite.

Amazonite:

![Amazonite Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/258/2025-01-22_17.png)

This is a very common ore found in the Limestone Caves. It is used for decoration.

# Mobs

Hollowed:

![Hollowed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4b5d478e91f0df62755158231109d7a373b21a6.png)

This mob will spawn rarely in the Hollow Fracture. It will watch the player from a distance, but if you get too close to it, then it will burrow and start to approach the player. You can tell when a borrowing Hollowed is near due to them giving players the Darkness Effect. When it gets close enough, it will emerge from the ground and begin chasing the player.

Stats:

Hp: 1000

Atk: 15

Def: 5



Lumencap:

![Lumencap](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/261/lumencap.png)

This mob is a relatively peaceful creature residing in the Lumenshroom Forest biome. It will approach a player when it spots them, as they are very curious creatures. Killing one has a chance to inflict the Fungal Curse effect for 5 minutes.

Stats:

Hp: 5

Atk: 0

Def: 0



Lumenshroom Spirit:

![Lumenshroom Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e818c6c1a923b9c6b5aeebac628e124c19a5a74b.png)

This large and intimidating creature will only spawn if a player with the Fungal Curse effect has said effect wear off. They are very strong and will be a difficult foe.

Stats:

Hp: 260

Atk: 13

Def: 0

Drops:

 -1 Spirit Essence

# Enchantments

Blinding Light:

-An enchantment similar to Thorns, this will light any undead that attack on fire. It can be found in any structure with randomly enchanted books, Mining Shacks, or by enchanting. Maximum level is three.

Double Ban:

-This rare enchantment can only be found in Mining shacks. It will give the wielder Strength III for 12.5 seconds when they smash something. Maximum level is one.

Elytra Veil:

-This uncommon enchantment can be found in Mining Shacks, enchanting, or anywhere that randomly enchanted books are found. The enchantment is basically an Elytra's version of protection. Maximum level is three.

Experience Gain:

-This uncommon enchantment can be found in Mining Shacks, enchanting, or anywhere that randomly enchanted books are found. Each level makes your pickaxe drop +1 experience per block mined. maximum level is three.

Hammer:

-This rare enchantment can only be found in Mining Shacks. It allows the pickaxe to mine a 3x3x3 area. Maximum level is one.

Recoil:

-This rare enchantment can be found in Broken Fortresses. It give the holder's Shield a chance to inflict damage upon the attacker. Maximum level is two.

Reinforced:

-This very rare enchantment can be found in Dacite Ruins or Mining Shacks. It is pretty much just Unbreaking X for tools. Maximum level is one.

# Biomes

Grimslate Caves:

![Grimslate Caves](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/266/2025-01-22_17.png)

This is a semi-common cave biome that is usually found near Forests, but it can be found in many different places.



Archaic Caves:

![Archaic Caves](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/267/2025-01-22_17.png)

This rare cave biome can most often be found under Jungles and Warm Oceans.



Hollow Fracture:

![Hollow Fracture](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/268/2025-01-22_17.png)

This rare cave biome is most often found beneath Swamps and Windswept Hills.



Dacite Caves:

![Dacite Caves](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/269/2025-01-22_17.png)

This small and rare cave biome is most often found beneath Mangrove Swamps and Jungles. Dacite Ruins on the surface can indicate that a Dacite Caves may be nearby.



Limestone Caves:

![Limestone Caves](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/270/2025-01-22_17.png)

This very common cave biome is most often found beneath Deserts and Badlands.



Lumenshroom Forest:

![Lumenshroom Forest](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/272/2025-01-22_17.png)

This very rare cave biome can be found under Mushroom Islands and in oceans near where a Mushroom Island might generate.



Glittering Caves:

![Glittering Caves](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/271/2025-01-22_17.png)

This semi-common cave biome is most often found beneath Badlands.



Diamond Mines:

![Diamond Mines](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1275/239/2025-08-02_18-31-32-png.png)

This is an extremely rare biome found in semi-mountainous tropical areas. This biome contains a huge amount of Diamond Ore at any vertical hieght. Woodland Mansion storage rooms may have a map to this location, but expect it to be tens of thousands of blocks away.

# Structures

Dacite Ruins:

![Dacite Ruins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/279/2025-01-22_18.png)

These are uncommon structures found in Jungles, Sparse Jungles, and Mangrove Swamps. They are very small, containing only one barrel of loot.



Dacite Fountain:

![Dacite Fountain](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/280/2025-01-22_18.png)

This rare structure can be found in the Dacite Caves. It contains a single chest with a small amount of loot.



Ancient Village:

![Ancient Village](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/281/2025-01-22_18.png)

This common structure can be found in Limestone Caves. It consists of a few houses with early game loot in them.



Broken Fortress:

![Broken Fortress](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1075/282/2025-01-22_18.png)

This common structure is found in the Hollow Fracture. It contains some rare loot. They are usually quite destroyed because of the biome they are in.



Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
